message:
feat(abi): add syscall-based /proc/self/maps reader and host dlopen/dlsym indirection

Harden symbol resolution boundaries to avoid recursive interposition
when FrankenLibC's dynamic hooks are active:

- Add read_file_via_syscalls() to read /proc/self/maps directly via
  sys_openat/sys_read/sys_close, bypassing intercepted stdio
- Replace direct libc::dlopen/dlsym calls with HOST_DLOPEN_PTR and
  HOST_DLSYM_PTR static function pointer indirection
- Add fallback path in resolve_cached_host_thread_symbol() to attempt
  host libc handle lookup before ELF parsing
- Add __frankenlibc_host_pthread_probe() diagnostic (kind 1-7) for
  symbol resolution debugging
- Update beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2hh.2","title":"Conformance: Shadow-run differential engine (vs glibc/musl)","description":"Shadow-run engine: execute real workloads simultaneously against FrankenLibC and glibc/musl, diff outputs at system call boundary. Report divergences with full call stack and input replay data. Integration with hierarchical delta debugging for auto-minimization of failing traces.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:02:17.755680649Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:23.169616839Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","frankenlibc","shadow-run","wedge"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2hh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

All records include trace_id.

- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:42.769127387Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T06:34:49.481868141Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T06:34:49.481795535Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","frankenlibc","logging","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2hh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","depends_on_id":"bd-oai.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":749,"issue_id":"bd-2hh.7","author":"MagentaFalcon","text":"Implemented conformance logging for fixture execution, shadow-run diffs, benchmark summaries, performance near-violation warnings, and regression detection.

Code changes:
- `crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/conformance_matrix.rs`
  - Added `duration_ms` to `ConformanceCaseRow`.
  - Added timed execution path (`Instant`-based) in matrix builder.
  - Added `CaseExecution`-driven builder for deterministic timeout/crash/error injection and coverage.
  - Extended tests for timeout/crash outcomes and duration capture.
- `crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/bin/harness.rs`
  - Extended `conformance-matrix` CLI with:
    - `--log` (default `target/conformance/conformance_matrix.log.jsonl`)
    - `--isolate`, `--case-timeout-ms`, `--perf-budget-ms`
  - Added structured log emission via `LogEmitter`:
    - TRACE: `conformance.fixture_execution`
    - DEBUG: `conformance.shadow_run_divergence`
    - INFO: `conformance.fixture_summary`, `conformance.benchmark_result`
    - WARN: `conformance.performance_budget_near_violation` (>=80% budget)
    - ERROR: `conformance.regression_detected` (prior pass -> current fail)
  - Added regression baseline loading from previous matrix artifact and benchmark duration stats helpers.
  - Added binary-unit tests validating required log level/event coverage and regression emission.

Validation (all cargo operations offloaded with `rch`):
1. `cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness conformance_matrix::tests:: -- --nocapture` ✅
2. `cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --bin harness emits_required_conformance_log_levels_and_regression_events -- --nocapture` ✅
3. `cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets` ✅
4. `cargo fmt --check --package frankenlibc-harness` ✅ (after formatting)
5. `cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings` ⚠️ fails due pre-existing unrelated ABI lint debt in `crates/frankenlibc-abi/*` (unsafe-op-in-unsafe-fn/manual_c_str_literals/etc), not from touched harness files.","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:34:46Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2icq","title":"EPIC: Gentoo Ecosystem Validation - Build the World with FrankenLibC","description":"# Strategic Context

Based on Twitter conversation (Feb 10-11, 2026) with @joelcompiles suggesting Gentoo validation:

> "Gentoo is designed to 'build the whole world' from source code. Ubuntu you can build individual packages but much trickier to do for all downstream dependencies."
> "Codex should be able to set up a stage 3 docker container that can build…say the top 100 C/C++ Gentoo packages."

This is the definitive validation that FrankenLibC works across the C/C++ ecosystem. If we can LD_PRELOAD FrankenLibC and successfully build+test the top 100+ Gentoo packages, we have proof that the membrane handles real-world code patterns.

# Key Insights from the Conversation

1. **Gentoo's Unique Advantage**: Unlike binary distros, Gentoo compiles everything from source with full control over CFLAGS, LDFLAGS, and LD_PRELOAD. Perfect for our interposition strategy.

2. **LLVM libc Partial Overlay**: @joelcompiles mentioned "LLVM's libc...the ability to do a partial overlay that uses part libc / part system C stdlib". This is exactly our L1/L2 graduation model.

3. **Validation Scope**: Top 100 C/C++ packages = comprehensive coverage of allocation patterns, string operations, threading models, signal handling, etc.

# Success Criteria

- Stage 3 Docker environment running with FrankenLibC LD_PRELOAD
- Top 100 C/C++ packages build successfully
- Test suites pass (or failures are documented with root cause)
- Performance overhead documented per-package
- Security healing actions logged and verified
- Zero regressions in FrankenLibC itself

# Strategic Value

This validates our claim: "If you're willing to absorb an extra <200ns per call, we can transform any code into safe code." Gentoo validation proves this at ecosystem scale.","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
1. Unit Test Evidence
- Add deterministic unit tests for nominal, boundary, and invalid-input paths in the touched modules.
- Include strict and hardened mode assertions when behavior differs by runtime mode.
- Include failure-mode tests covering repair/deny/default behavior with explicit expected outputs.

2. Integration + E2E Evidence
- Add or extend fixture-driven integration coverage in `tests/conformance` and/or `tests/integration` for this bead scope.
- Add a deterministic E2E script path (or harness command) with explicit setup/teardown and replayable seeds.
- Compare FrankenLibC outputs against host glibc fixtures (or documented replacement-level contract) for all touched symbols.

3. Logging + Traceability Evidence
- Emit structured logs (JSONL or deterministic text) that include bead ID, scenario ID, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, and outcome.
- Verify logs expose repair/deny counters and reason codes so regressions are diagnosable from artifacts alone.
- Record artifact paths in bead notes (test logs, fixture diffs, benchmark outputs, conformance reports).

4. Performance + Regression Evidence
- Capture before/after baseline for latency/throughput on touched hot paths.
- Enforce no-regression threshold or document bounded tradeoff with quantitative rationale.

5. CI Gate Evidence
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo check --all-targets`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets`
- all bead-specific harness and E2E scripts pass with deterministic logs archived.","notes":"2026-02-13 plan-space optimization pass: removed over-blocking edges (bd-2icq.13<-22/24, bd-2icq.14<-21/22), added missing gate edges (bd-2icq.12<-14, bd-2icq.23<-14, bd-2icq.24<-13/14, bd-2icq.17<-20/23, bd-2icq.11<-21, bd-2icq.16<-12), aligned priorities (.20/.21/.24 -> P1, .1 -> P2), and set explicit acceptance criteria on all open bd-2icq.* beads requiring comprehensive unit tests, E2E scripts, and structured logging evidence. Suggested execution order: 13+14 in parallel, then 24+23+18+21+20, then 12, then 11+22, then 17, then 16, with .1 as lower-priority research.

## Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for happy-path, edge-case, and invalid-input behavior.
- [ ] Property-style or fuzz-seed replay coverage added where state space is large/combinatorial.
- [ ] Integration fixtures added/updated in `tests/conformance` and validated against host glibc expectations.
- [ ] Deterministic E2E script/runner added or updated with explicit command lines and seed controls.
- [ ] Strict vs hardened behavior assertions are explicit and versioned in fixtures.
- [ ] Structured logs include: timestamp, bead ID, test scenario, runtime mode, symbol family, decision path, action (allow/repair/deny), and result.
- [ ] Failure logs include reason codes + minimal reproducible input payload metadata.
- [ ] Benchmark/perf logs include baseline, candidate, delta %, and pass/fail gate decision.
- [ ] CI artifacts include conformance report, E2E transcript, and summarized pass/fail matrix.
- [ ] Release/merge gate blocked if any required test or log artifact is missing.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:45:23.176210667Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:17:02.347804854Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":750,"issue_id":"bd-2icq","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:04Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-33p.1","title":"Canonical evidence schema v2 for unit/conformance/e2e/perf/release","description":"Background:
- Evidence currently exists across many surfaces, but closure needs one canonical schema.

Scope:
- Define schema v2 that unifies unit/e2e/conformance/perf/release events.
- Require consistent keys for cross-join (`trace_id`, `mode`, `symbol`, `bead_id`, `artifact_ref`).

Deliverables:
1) Schema profile with required/optional fields and enums.
2) Versioning + backward-compatibility policy.
3) Compliance checklist for all emitters.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every gate output validates against schema v2.
- Consumers can aggregate without lossy ad-hoc transforms.

Rationale:
- Makes evidence queryable and supports deterministic triage.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for serialization/validation across event types.
- E2E validation pass on sample gate outputs.
- Logs include schema_version and validation status for each event stream.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Codex","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:12.706070755Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-12T21:23:46.631171699Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T21:23:46.631149017Z","close_reason":"Delivered structured log evidence schema v2 (stream/gate/span/profile fields) + updated validators/tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["evidence","logging","schema"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33p.1","depends_on_id":"bd-33p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":938,"issue_id":"bd-33p.1","author":"Codex","text":"Starting bd-33p.1 now. First pass is to inventory existing schemas (tests/conformance/log_schema.json, tests/conformance/closure_evidence_schema.json, runtime_math EVR1 record format) and define a v2 canonical schema that can join unit/conformance/e2e/perf/release artifacts under consistent keys (trace_id, bead_id, mode, api_family/symbol, artifact_ref) with validators + failure-injection tests.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:12:48Z"},{"id":939,"issue_id":"bd-33p.1","author":"Codex","text":"Progress update: implemented log evidence schema v2 (backward-compatible). Changes: bumped tests/conformance/log_schema.json schema_version to 2 and added forward-looking optional fields for stream/gate/span/profile/healing_action/exit_code/duration_ms; updated crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/structured_log.rs to support/serialize/validate these fields; updated scripts/check_structured_logs.sh to require schema_version>=2; updated crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/structured_log_test.rs to assert schema_version>=2. Local verification: cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test structured_log_test (with isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR) and scripts/check_structured_logs.sh both pass.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:20:18Z"},{"id":940,"issue_id":"bd-33p.1","author":"Codex","text":"Follow-up: updated JSONL emitters to start using new v2 join fields: scripts/e2e_suite.sh now emits {stream:e2e, gate:e2e_suite} on every log line; scripts/bd35a_evidence_run.sh now emits {stream:e2e, gate:bd35a_evidence_run}. Verified cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test e2e_suite_test passes.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:23:21Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33p.2","title":"Cross-crate trace propagation + runtime decision explainability fields","description":"Background:
- Even valid events are low-value if they cannot be correlated end-to-end.

Scope:
- Ensure trace and context propagation across ABI boundary, membrane runtime decision law, harness runners, and report generators.
- Add explicit decision explainability fields (controller, gate, action, risk inputs).

Deliverables:
1) Context propagation contract across crates.
2) Explainability field set and semantics.
3) Fallback behavior when context is missing.

Acceptance Criteria:
- A single failing symbol can be traced from entrypoint to final report.
- Decision reason fields are always present for runtime actions.

Rationale:
- Enables postmortem-grade diagnostics without re-running workloads.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for propagation APIs and field defaults.
- E2E failure path test verifying full trace chain.
- Logs: trace_id, span_id, symbol, decision, risk_inputs, controller_id.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Codex","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:12.817767467Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-12T21:49:51.306787232Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T21:49:51.306768226Z","close_reason":"Delivered cross-crate trace propagation + runtime decision explainability contract with fallback and validation/report coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["logging","runtime-math","traceability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33p.2","depends_on_id":"bd-33p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33p.2","depends_on_id":"bd-33p.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":941,"issue_id":"bd-33p.2","author":"Codex","text":"bd-33p.1 is closed; bd-33p.2 is now unblocked. Log schema v2 is in tests/conformance/log_schema.json (schema_version=2) and Rust support is in crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/structured_log.rs. New optional join fields: stream, gate, span_id/parent_span_id, profile(Fast|Full), healing_action, exit_code, duration_ms. scripts/e2e_suite.sh and scripts/bd35a_evidence_run.sh now emit stream+gate.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:23:54Z"},{"id":942,"issue_id":"bd-33p.2","author":"Codex","text":"Implemented bd-33p.2 trace/explainability contract across ABI + membrane + harness. Highlights: (1) runtime decision context in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/runtime_policy.rs with entrypoint scopes, fallback trace context, per-call explainability snapshot (trace_id/span_id/symbol/controller_id/decision_action/risk inputs + policy/risk/evidence seqno); (2) allocator ABI entrypoints now scope decision context (malloc/free/calloc/realloc/posix_memalign/memalign/aligned_alloc) for symbol-level linkage; (3) structured log contract hardened in crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/structured_log.rs with runtime_decision explainability validation (controller_id/decision_action/risk_inputs); (4) report generator extended via DecisionTraceReport in crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/report.rs to detect missing trace-chain links and aggregate explainability coverage; (5) CI gate updated in scripts/check_structured_logs.sh to enforce decision explainability fields when decision is present. Validation run: cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane runtime_math::evidence::tests:: -- --nocapture; cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi runtime_policy::tests:: -- --nocapture; cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test structured_log_test -- --nocapture; cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness report::tests:: -- --nocapture; scripts/check_structured_logs.sh; cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi; cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:49:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33p.3","title":"Evidence compliance gate: schema + artifact index + failure-injection tests","description":"Background:
- Closure requires hard failure when telemetry is incomplete.

Scope:
- Implement CI gate that validates schema conformance and artifact index completeness.
- Add negative tests that intentionally omit fields/artifacts to verify deterministic failure messaging.

Deliverables:
1) Evidence compliance CI job.
2) Failure-injection e2e suite for observability regressions.
3) Triage output format with direct artifact pointers.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Any schema violation fails CI with actionable diagnostics.
- Intentional bad cases fail for the expected reason.

Rationale:
- Guards against silent observability degradation over time.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for index completeness checks.
- E2E tests with injected telemetry defects.
- Logs include violation_code, offending_event, expected_fields, remediation_hint.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Codex","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:12.929519332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-12T22:27:43.988992541Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T22:12:41.980216409Z","close_reason":"Implemented evidence compliance CLI gate + failure-injection tests + triage output format + CI script","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","logging","quality-gate"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","depends_on_id":"bd-33p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","depends_on_id":"bd-33p.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":943,"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","author":"Codex","text":"Starting bd-33p.3.

Plan:
- Implement a deterministic evidence compliance validator (schema validation via structured_log::validate_log_line + artifact_index completeness + failure-path artifact_refs existence) in frankenlibc-harness.
- Add failure-injection integration tests that generate synthetic JSONL + artifact_index + artifacts and assert deterministic violation codes + actionable diagnostics.
- Provide a small script gate (scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh) that runs the validator/tests.

Note: scripts/ci.sh currently has unrelated closure-contract WIP in the worktree; I will avoid editing CI wiring until that is coordinated.","created_at":"2026-02-12T22:03:06Z"},{"id":944,"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","author":"Codex","text":"Completed evidence compliance gate wiring and failure-injection suite.\n\nChanges:\n- Exposed and wired evidence compliance module into harness CLI ()\n- Added triage JSON output format with required fields: violation_code, offending_event, expected_fields, remediation_hint, artifact_pointer\n- Added integration test suite: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/evidence_compliance_test.rs\n- Added CI gate script: scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh\n- Added CI extended-gates wiring in scripts/ci.sh\n\nValidation:\n- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness\n- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test evidence_compliance_test -- --nocapture (4 passed)\n- scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh (PASS)\n- Regression checks: closure_contract_test (6 passed), release_gate_dag_test (5 passed)","created_at":"2026-02-12T22:12:41Z"},{"id":945,"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","author":"Codex","text":"Committed core bd-33p.3 implementation in ac4a0ba (evidence_compliance validator + harness CLI triage + failure-injection integration tests). Verified: cargo fmt --check; cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test evidence_compliance_test (4 passed).","created_at":"2026-02-12T22:16:37Z"},{"id":946,"issue_id":"bd-33p.3","author":"Codex","text":"## Evidence Compliance Gate Implemented (bd-33p.3)

Delivered
- Evidence bundle validator: `crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/evidence_compliance.rs`
  - Validates JSONL log schema via `structured_log::validate_log_line`
  - Validates `artifact_index.json` schema + sha256 integrity
  - Enforces that failure outcomes include non-empty `artifact_refs` and that refs exist + are indexed
  - Deterministic violation ordering and actionable violation codes + remediation hints
- Harness CLI: `harness evidence-compliance --workspace-root ... --log ... --artifact-index ... [--output ...]`
  - Emits triage JSON with `{violation_code, offending_event, expected_fields, remediation_hint, artifact_pointer, line_number, message}`
- CI gate script: `scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh` (runs failure-injection integration tests)
- CI wiring (extended gates): `scripts/ci.sh` now runs evidence compliance gate when `FRANKENLIBC_EXTENDED_GATES=1`

Tests / Verification
- `bash scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh` (PASS)
- `cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test evidence_compliance_test -- --nocapture` (4 passed)

Notes
- Agent Mail MCP server is currently overloaded (`health_level=red`), so coordination is via bead comments for now.","created_at":"2026-02-12T22:27:43Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-33xi","title":"Integration: real-world application testing","description":"Final integration testing with real-world applications.

Goal: Validate FrankenLibC works correctly with production software.

Test Applications (Tier 1 - Must Work):
1. bash - Interactive shell, job control
2. coreutils - ls, cat, cp, mv, grep, etc.
3. Python 3 - Interpreter, pip, basic scripts
4. curl - HTTP/HTTPS requests
5. git - Version control operations

Test Applications (Tier 2 - Should Work):
1. nginx - HTTP server, static files
2. PostgreSQL - Database server
3. Redis - Key-value store
4. Node.js - JavaScript runtime
5. Go programs - Static binaries

Test Scenarios:
1. Basic functionality
2. Long-running operation
3. High-load stress test
4. Error condition handling
5. Graceful shutdown

Validation:
- Functional correctness (same output as glibc)
- Performance (within acceptable overhead)
- Stability (no crashes over extended run)
- Memory (no leaks, bounded overhead)

Infrastructure:
- Docker containers for each application
- Automated test scripts
- Output comparison framework
- Performance monitoring

Success Criteria:
- All Tier 1 applications work correctly
- Tier 2 applications work for basic operations
- No crashes or hangs
- Performance within budgets

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"## Integration Test Results — RusticHorse (2026-03-22)

### 45+ programs work under LD_PRELOAD

Working: true, echo, cat, ls, pwd, date, uname, id, whoami, wc, head, tail, 
stat, env, basename, dirname, expr, seq, md5sum, sha256sum, find, tty, 
realpath, readlink, touch, rm, mkdir, rmdir, cp, mv, chmod, free, yes, nl, 
tee, paste, python3 (version + calc + hashlib + json), curl, wget, 
bash (for loops), awk (field splitting), grep

Failing: du, df, uptime (statvfs/proc), git (internal init), sort (pthread)

### 10 bugs fixed to achieve this
See Agent Mail thread bd-2vv for full details.

### Verification
- cargo clippy clean
- 302 total tests passing (38 ctype + 172 glibc_internal + 92 harness)","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RusticHorse","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:04:25.579927038Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T03:36:39.960185467Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","integration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-1m5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-2tq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-2vv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Validation:

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"## Integration Test Results — RusticHorse (2026-03-22)

### 45+ programs work under LD_PRELOAD

Working: true, echo, cat, ls, pwd, date, uname, id, whoami, wc, head, tail, 
stat, env, basename, dirname, expr, seq, md5sum, sha256sum, find, tty, 
realpath, readlink, touch, rm, mkdir, rmdir, cp, mv, chmod, free, yes, nl, 
tee, paste, python3 (version + calc + hashlib + json), curl, wget, 
bash (for loops), awk (field splitting), grep

Failing: du, df, uptime (statvfs/proc), git (internal init), sort (pthread)

### Verification
- cargo clippy clean
- 302 total tests passing (38 ctype + 172 glibc_internal + 92 harness)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RusticHorse","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:04:25.579927038Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-23T08:23:03.134908103Z","closed_at":"2026-03-23T08:23:03.133547518Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","integration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-1m5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-2tq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-33xi","depends_on_id":"bd-2vv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-33zg","title":"bd-h5x subtask: dlfcn boundary policy (replace vs explicit fallback) with guard rails","description":"Background:
- dlfcn behavior is hard to replace fully; we need explicit boundary policy that preserves safety and claim honesty.

Goal:
- Define and implement dlfcn callthrough minimization boundary with explicit allowed fallback semantics.

Deliverables:
1) dlfcn surface classification: replace vs explicit fallback.
2) Guard policy enforcing no unapproved fallback paths.
3) Support matrix + docs updates reflecting exact dlfcn status.

Acceptance Criteria:
- dlfcn callthrough behavior is policy-controlled and auditable.
- Unapproved dlfcn fallback triggers gate failure.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit tests for boundary policy decisions.
- E2E tests for representative dlopen/dlsym workflows.
- Structured logs with symbol/path decision traces.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberStone","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:32.813499095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:09:57.506068574Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:09:57.506027818Z","close_reason":"Implemented explicit dlfcn interpose/replacement boundary policy artifact + enforcement gate + docs/support-matrix alignment","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["callthrough","critique","dlfcn","docs","verification"],"comments":[{"id":947,"issue_id":"bd-33zg","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented bd-33zg dlfcn boundary policy + guard rails.\n\nDelivered:\n- tests/conformance/dlfcn_boundary_policy.v1.json\n- scripts/check_dlfcn_boundary_policy.sh\n- crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/dlfcn_boundary_policy_test.rs\n- scripts/abi_audit.sh (dlfcn strict/hardened semantics source-of-truth update)\n- support_matrix.json (dlfcn strict/hardened semantics aligned to explicit boundary policy)\n- tests/conformance/mode_semantics_matrix.json (Loader hardened invalid_flags corrected to RTLD_NOW)\n- tests/conformance/replacement_profile.json (dlfcn_boundary_policy section + enforcement gate reference)\n- README.md + FEATURE_PARITY.md (explicit interpose vs replacement dlfcn boundary contract text)\n\nVerification:\n- scripts/check_dlfcn_boundary_policy.sh PASS\n- scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh interpose PASS\n- scripts/check_mode_semantics.sh PASS\n\nNote on harness test execution:\n- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test dlfcn_boundary_policy_test currently fails before running tests due unrelated upstream compile error in crates/frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/thread.rs (E0603: syscall::raw is private), introduced outside this bead scope.","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:09:52Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-34s","title":"Epic: Formal Proof Obligations (22 Theorems)","description":"22 formal proof obligations required before release: strict refinement, hardened safety, deterministic replay, CPOMDP safety feasibility, barrier invariance, HJI viability, sheaf global-consistency, SOS certificate soundness, Galois connection safety model (gamma(alpha(c))>=c), monotonic safety (lattice join idempotent), P(undetected corruption)<=2^-64, UAF detection P=1, buffer overflow P(miss)<=2^-64. Offline synthesis (SDP, SMT, game solving) -> runtime compact guards.

## Success Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:58:44.050219046Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:26.840319773Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","formal","frankenlibc","proofs","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34s","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":948,"issue_id":"bd-34s","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:05Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-34s.1","title":"Proofs: Strict refinement + hardened safety + deterministic replay proofs","description":"Formal proofs for: (1) strict mode is a refinement of glibc behavior, (2) hardened mode satisfies safety properties (no UB escape), (3) deterministic replay (same inputs -> same outputs given immutable mode). Must produce machine-checkable artifacts (Lean4, Coq, or Kani harness proofs).

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:28.725240983Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:24.517863698Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["core","formal","frankenlibc","proofs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34s.1","depends_on_id":"bd-34s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
